title: Infosys appoints Nitin Paranjpe as Vice Chairman and approves promoter-group reclassification request
detailed_summary: Infosys Board approved the appointment of Nitin Paranjpe as non-executive Vice Chairman of the Board with immediate effect on April 30, 2026. The company stated Nandan Nilekani will continue as Chairman of the Board as long as necessary and that there is no plan for a chairman transition. The Board also approved a request from Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal to be reclassified from the 'Promoter and Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category, subject to Regulation 31A compliance and shareholder approval as may be required. The applicants together held ~ 0.56% of Infosys equity share capital as on April 30, 2026. Infosys also allotted 35,384 equity shares under the 2015 Incentive Compensation Plan, increasing issued and subscribed share capital to ₹ 20, 27,82,93,815/- divided into 4,05,56,58,763 equity shares of face value of ₹ 5/ - each.

key_facts.fact: The Board approved the appointment of Nitin Paranjpe as Vice Chairman of the Board with immediate effect.
key_facts.section_heading: 1. Appointment of Nitin Paranjpe as Vice Chairman of the Company:

key_facts.fact: Infosys described Nitin Paranjpe's role as non-executive-Vice Chairman of the Board.
Nandan Nilekani stated that he will continue as Chairman of the Board as long as necessary and that there is no plan for a chairman transition.

The Board approved the request from Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal for reclassification from the 'Promoter and Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category, subject to compliance with Regulation 31A of the LODR Regulations, including shareholder approval as may be required.
key_facts.section_heading: 2. Re-classification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from 'Promoter and Promoter Group' to 'public' category:

key_facts.fact: The Applicants together held ~ 0.56% of the equity share capital of the Company as on April 30, 2026.
The Board stated that the reclassification of the Applicants will not have any impact on the operations of the Company, or on the Board/ Management/ Shareholders of the Company.
The Board approved the allotment of 35,384 equity shares of face value of ₹ 5 each pursuant to the exercise of Restricted Stock Units by eligible employees under the 2015 Incentive Compensation Plan.
Effective from April 30, 2026, Infosys issued and subscribed share capital increased to ₹ 20, 27,82,93,815/- divided into 4,05,56,58,763 equity shares of face value of ₹ 5/ - each.

processing_notes: The source text contains corrupted spacing and OCR artifacts in the applicants' request letter; extracted only facts that remained clear. Generic company profile and safe harbor content were excluded.
